name_en: Velvet🤩 Double Flap 2.55 Classic New Model《Burgundy Wine🍷》🚩🚩🚩OHANEL New CF Hidden Model🙈 Really beautiful at first glance, I just🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and durable💖 The special thing is that usually the shoulder strap is made of cowhide with a chain, this pairing of coffee leather with a chain shoulder strap is more high-end and retro, a fashionable item!
